activities_projects.title: Modes of Transport Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the different modes of transport in India
steps: List the three major transport domains: land, water, and air
Add examples like roadways, railways, waterways, and airways
Create a chart showing their features and uses

activities_projects.title: Road Network Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Identify important road networks in India
steps: Locate the Golden Quadrilateral on the map
Mark Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai, and Kolkata
Highlight the North-South and East-West corridors
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands major road networks in India

activities_projects.title: Railway Zones Project
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the organisation of Indian Railways
steps: Find out the current railway zones in India
Write their headquarters
Locate at least five railway zones on the map
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct information and map work (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Pipeline Transport Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of pipeline transport
steps: List three important pipelines in India
Write their routes and purpose
Explain why pipelines are efficient for transporting oil and gas

activities_projects.title: Inland Waterways Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Learn about inland waterways in India
steps: Identify the five national waterways
Write the rivers or canals they use
Mark them on the map of India

activities_projects.title: Major Ports Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of sea ports in trade
steps: List at least five major sea ports in India
Locate them on the map
Write one key feature of each port
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns the importance of ports in trade

activities_projects.title: Air Transport Advantages
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of airways in difficult terrains
steps: Write five advantages of air transport
Explain why airways are important in the north-eastern states
Give examples of remote areas connected by air

activities_projects.title: Communication Methods Poster
steps: List personal and mass communication methods
Include examples like radio, television, newspapers, and internet
Design a poster showing their importance

activities_projects.title: Trade Balance Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand exports, imports, and balance of trade
steps: List five items exported from India
List five items imported by India
Explain the meaning of favourable and unfavourable balance of trade

activities_projects.title: Tourism Development Project
steps: Choose a tourist place in your state
Write about its attractions and connectivity
Suggest ways to promote tourism in that area
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns role of tourism in economic development
